data.biography:
Chen Yu Qi (English name: Yukee) is a Chinese actress, born as Chen Qian in Chengdu of Sichuan Province. She graduated from the Department of Arts of Jincheng College of Sichuan University, majoring in performance.

Chen started out as an extra in Hengdian World Studios. She struggled to get roles until she was discovered in 2015 by Tang Yang while filming "Westward Journey 3".

In February 2017, she was awarded the "Annual Emerging Drama Star" at the 2017 China TV Drama Quality Festival for her supporting role in the 2016 costume drama "Princess Wei Yang". In August 2018, she was named the "New Generation Female Artist of the Year" at the InStyle Annual Idol Festival Awards.

Her lead role in the wuxia drama "Heavenly Sword and Dragon Slaying Sabre (2019)" won four awards, namely the "Best Actress in a Network Drama Team" and the "Excellent Actor" at the 6th China TV Good Actor Awards, the "Breakthrough Actress of the Year" at the 4th Jinguduo Internet Film Festival, and the "Breakthrough TV Drama Actor of the Year" at the 2019 Tencent Video Starlight Awards.

In December the following year, Chen won the "Artist of the Year" at the 2020 Tencent Video Starlight Awards.
data.name: Chen Yuqi

data.biography:
陈钰琪，中国内地女演员，出生于四川成都，毕业于四川大学表演系。其外表清新亮丽、眼眸清澈灵动。

　　2015年，拍摄《大话西游3》时与唐嫣相识，后正式签约成为自唐嫣工作室成立以来签约的首批演员。  2016年，出演古装传奇剧《锦绣未央》，饰演娇俏可爱的九公主拓跋迪；同年9月，出演悬疑武侠数字电影《侠捕》。
data.name: 陈钰琪

data.biography: 陳鈺琪，本名陳倩，中國大陸女演員，出身於四川省成都市。她於2016年飾演《錦繡未央》內九公主「拓跋迪」一角引起眾人關注，2018年主演《香蜜沉沉燼如霜》中魔族卞城公主「鎏英」而為人熟知。
data.name: Yukee Chen

data.biography: Trần Ngọc Kỳ là nữ diễn viên Trung Quốc đại lục thuộc, được biết đến qua vai diễn trong Cẩm Tú Vị Ương, Hương mật tựa khói sương, Ỷ Thiên Đồ Long Ký, Nguyệt Thượng Trùng Hỏa, Kính Song Thành, Xưa Kia Có Ngói Lưu Ly và nhiều bộ phim đang chờ phát sóng.
data.name: Trần Ngọc Kỳ

data.biography: 陳鈺琪，本名陳鈺琪，中國大陸女演員，出身於四川省成都市。她於 2016 年飾演《錦繡未央》內九公主「拓跋迪」一角引起眾人關注，2018 年主演《香蜜沉沉燼如霜》中魔族卞城公主「鎏英」而為人熟知。
data.name: 陳鈺琪

data.biography: Kim Kap-soo is a South Korean actor. Since his acting debut in 1977, Kim has had a long career on the stage, in television dramas and film. In addition to acting full-time, he also has his own master class acting studio.
data.name: Kim Kap-soo

data.biography:
金甲洙  国籍	 南韩

出生	1957年4月7日（64岁）南韩首尔特别市  职业	演员

语言	韩语

活跃年代	1977年至今

经纪公司	Fe Entertainment
data.name: 金甲洙

data.biography: Kim Kap-soo é um ator sul-coreano. Desde sua estreia como ator em 1977, Kim teve uma longa carreira no palco, em dramas de televisão e no cinema. Além de atuar em tempo integral, ele também possui seu próprio estúdio de atuação master class.
data.name: Kim Kap-soo

data.biography: 金甲洙國籍 南韓 出生 1957 年 4 月 7 日（64 歲）南韓首爾特別市 職業 演員 語言 韓語 活躍年代 1977 年至今 經紀公司 Fe Entertainment
data.name: 金甲洙
